# FastQDesign

The goal of FastQDesign is to guide the investigator in designing a
single-cell RNA sequencing(scRNA-seq) experiment. We aim to shift the
focus back to raw FastQ reads other than the Unique Molecular Identifier
(UMI) matrix when considering the scRNA-seq experiment. The
[paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42003-025-07938-8) is now
open-access, PMID:
[40175506](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40175506/).

## Installation

You can install the development version of FastQDesign from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

    # install.packages("devtools")
    devtools::install_github("yuw444/FastQDesign")

## fastF

[fastF](https://github.com/yuw444/fastF) is a submodel of the
FastQDesign framework, it is written in C for efficiency and broad
compatibility. It helps generate pseudo-design datasets from the FastQ
reference.

## Prepare the Reference and Subsample

This is a basic example which shows you how to prepare the subsamples
and reference for the comparison:

    library(FastQDesign)
    library(Seurat)

    aibm <- readRDS("~/Documents/Research/FastQDesign/reference_list.rds")[[1]]

    ref_list <- SamplePrep(
      aibm,
      condition = "orig.ident",
      cell_3d_embedding = TRUE,
      interactive = TRUE,
      min.pct = 0.2,
      logfc.threshold = 0.3,
      return.thresh = 0.05,
      verbose = TRUE
    )

    fastq_ds <- readRDS("~/Documents/Research/FastQDesign/bam_downsample_list.rds")[[1]]

    ds_list <- SamplePrep(
      fastq_ds,
      n_clusters = 4,
      condition = "orig.ident",
      cell_3d_embedding = TRUE,
      root_cells_ref = Cells(aibm)[aibm$root_cells],
      min.pct = 0.2,
      logfc.threshold = 0.3,
      return.thresh = 0.05,
      verbose = TRUE
    )

    match_list <- SampleMatch(cb03_list, ds_list)

In the above example, `aibm` is the reference Seurat object, `fastq_ds`
is generated with the FastQ downsample by
[fastF](https://github.com/yuw444/fastF).

## Generate One Dot in the Similarity Surface

    ## the similiarity from one subsample

    ARI <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(match_list$seurat_cluster.x, match_list$seurat_cluster.y)

    JaccardCluster <- FastQDesign:::JaccardIndex(match_list$genes_cluster$ref, match_list$genes_cluster$ds)
    JaccardCondition <- FastQDesign:::JaccardIndex(match_list$genes_condition$ref, match_list$genes_condition$ds)

    Kendall <- cor(match_list$cluster_match$pseudotime.x, match_list$cluster_match$pseudotime.y, method = "kendall")

    similarity <- mean(c(ARI, JaccardCluster, JaccardCondition, Kendall))

## Design

    df_power_paper <- read.csv("~/Documents/Research/FastQDesign/AIBM_power.csv")

    budget <- 7500
    power_threshold <- 0.8
    flow_capacities <- c(10^7, 5 * 10^7, 2 * 10^8)
    flow_costs <- c(1000, 2000, 3000)
    library_costs <- 5000

    library(dplyr)
    library(ggplot2)
    rst_design <- FastQDesign(
      df_power = df_power_paper %>% dplyr::select(n_cells, expected_reads_per_cell, power_fastq),
      budget = budget,
      power_threshold = power_threshold,
      flow_capacities = flow_capacities,
      flow_costs = flow_costs,
      library_costs = library_costs
    )

# Package index

## Main Functions

- [`FastQDesign()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/FastQDesign.md)
  : FastQDesign

- [`SamplePrep()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/SamplePrep.md)
  : Prepare a sample

- [`SampleMatch()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/SampleMatch.md)
  : Match Downsample to Reference

- [`DownSample()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/DownSample.md)
  : Down Sample a Seurat object

- [`FindPseudotime()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/FindPseudotime.md)
  :

  Find Pseudotime for `Seurat` Object

## Analysis Utilities

- [`ConditionalShannonEntropy()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/ConditionalShannonEntropy.md)
  : Conditional Shannon Entropy

- [`Entropy()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/Entropy.md)
  : Entropy

- [`ExtractMTX()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/ExtractMTX.md)
  : Extract metadata from mtx.gz file

- [`FindAllMarkersByCondition()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/FindAllMarkersByCondition.md)
  : Find Markers By Condition

- [`FixedNumClusters()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/FixedNumClusters.md)
  : Customize Cluster Number

- [`JaccardIndex()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/JaccardIndex.md)
  : Jaccard Index

- [`MarkerGeneFilter()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/MarkerGeneFilter.md)
  : DE Markers Filters

- [`OptimalNumClusters()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/OptimalNumClusters.md)
  : Find the optimal number of cell clusters for Seurat object

- [`PPV()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/PPV.md) :
  Positive Predictive Value(PPV)

- [`RootNodeSelect()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/RootNodeSelect.md)
  :

  Root Node Selection for `cell_data_set`

## fastF Subcommands

- [`fastF_freq()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/fastF_freq.md)
  : Find Cell Barcode Whitelist from FastQ
- [`fastF_filter()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/fastF_filter.md)
  : Filter FastQ Files Using Whitelist
- [`fastF_crb()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/fastF_crb.md)
  : Extract CR/CB Tags from BAM
- [`fastF_bam2db()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/fastF_bam2db.md)
  : Convert BAM to SQLite UMI Matrix
- [`fastF_extract()`](https://yuw444.github.io/FastQDesign/reference/fastF_extract.md)
  : Extract Custom Tags from BAM
